name: 400m Repeats

1.5km warm up at a conversational pace (no faster than 6:45/km), 90s walking rest

5 reps of:
• 400m at 5:15/km (5:05-5:25/km), 60s walking rest

1.5km cool down at a conversational pace (or slower!) with Runna.
